tasks.name: queue smoke: complete a simple linux housekeeper run
tasks.prompt: Run a minimal linux housekeeper job that exercises the queue-based supervisor path and finishes with a real summary artifact.

tasks.name: summary audit: inspect a live run and extract failure signals
tasks.prompt: Inspect a real live run directory, read the terminal summary, and produce a compact root-cause note with the observed status, artifact shape, and failure signals.
pass_conditions: summary.final_status is one of completed, failed, stalled, timed_out
root-cause note references at least one concrete artifact path

tasks.name: regression diff: compare two live-run summaries
tasks.prompt: Compare a baseline live-run summary against a new run and emit a regression matrix that highlights what changed in status, root cause, and artifacts.
pass_conditions: regression matrix contains baseline and head rows
matrix records status and root_cause deltas

tasks.name: stall classifier: explain a timed out or stalled live run
tasks.prompt: Take a live run that did not complete cleanly and classify whether it stalled, timed out, fell back to a mock path, or failed an assertion.
pass_conditions: failure classification includes a stable label
failure classification cites the decisive signal

tasks.name: fast poll: verify short-run execution and summary capture
tasks.prompt: Run a short queue task that should complete quickly, produce a clean summary artifact, and confirm the benchmark path handles the minimal happy path without drift.
pass_conditions: summary.final_status is one of completed, ready_for_promotion, promoted

tasks.name: deadline guard: hit the timeout boundary safely
tasks.prompt: Run a queue task with a long but bounded execution window so the benchmark can observe timeout-edge behavior without changing the task logic.
pass_conditions: summary.final_status is one of completed, failed, stalled, timed_out
summary.root_cause.kind is set when not completed

tasks.name: progress starve: expose stalled_no_progress on sparse progress
tasks.prompt: Run a task that intentionally has sparse visible progress markers so the live-run benchmark can observe whether stall detection remains stable under low-signal execution.
pass_conditions: summary.final_status is one of completed, failed, stalled, timed_out
summary.first_progress_at is set or a stall root cause is recorded

tasks.name: mock fallback check: verify fallback path visibility
tasks.prompt: Run a task designed to surface model fallback behavior and confirm the summary records whether the run switched to a mock or fallback path.
pass_conditions: summary.root_cause.kind is set when fallback affects outcome

tasks.name: business assert: require the run to satisfy a business-level check
tasks.prompt: Run a task that only passes when a business-level assertion is met so the matrix can separate execution success from business validation success.
pass_conditions: summary.business_assertion_status is one of passed, failed, unknown
summary.root_cause.kind is set when validation fails

tasks.name: artifact integrity: check that required outputs are complete
tasks.prompt: Run a task that verifies required artifacts are present and complete, then record missing or partial artifact signals in the summary.
pass_conditions: summary.root_cause.kind is set when artifacts are incomplete

tasks.name: real task scan: exercise a more realistic business-like run
tasks.prompt: Run a more realistic task that combines execution, artifact production, and summary capture to approximate a small business workload rather than a toy benchmark.
pass_conditions: summary.root_cause.kind is set when the run fails

tasks.name: long run pressure: keep the executor alive under a larger budget
tasks.prompt: Run a longer queue task with a larger time budget so the benchmark can observe late-stage state transitions, retries, and cleanup behavior under pressure.
pass_conditions: summary.root_cause.kind is set when the run does not complete cleanly
